entries.description: register_session_start: wrote session-state.json with currentSession=1, status=in-progress, lifecycleState=work_in_progress, orchestrator=claude-code/anthropic/claude-opus-4-7/high.
Authored ai-assignment.md directly per the standing operator constraint (no mid-session router calls beyond verification). Recommends Opus high-effort for both Session 1 and Session 2.
git mv ai-router ai_router. 40+ file rename entries; full directory contents moved with no content loss.
Updated pytest.ini testpaths from ai-router/tests to ai_router/tests.

Updated internal references inside the renamed ai_router/ via sed (36 files: Python sources, docstrings, router-config.yaml, schemas/disposition.schema.json, docs/close-out.md, docs/two-cli-workflow.md, all tests). Then hand-rewrote stale 'hyphenated package import' comments in disposition.py, orchestrator_role.py, verifier_role.py, conftest.py, test_disposition.py, test_failure_injection.py, test_print_session_set_status_cancelled.py, test_session_events.py.
Added __version__ = '0.1.0' to ai_router/__init__.py.

Updated CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md: file-map bullet, Building & testing block (now `pip install -e .[tests]` from repo root), AI router import block in AGENTS/GEMINI replaced with `from ai_router import route`.

Updated README.md: TOC anchor, file map's ### ai-router/ heading -> ### ai_router/, every ai_router/foo.py link, and the Adopting section (Step 1 mentions ai_router/ + pyproject.toml; Step 3 -> pip install -e .; Step 4 -> from ai_router import route).
Updated docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md: rewrote Importing the Router section (drops importlib shim), updated all 15 path references.
Updated docs/planning/repo-worktree-layout.md, lessons-learned.md, session-set-authoring-guide.md, docs/session-state-schema-example.md path refs.
Replaced importlib shim with direct `import ai_router` in 13 scripts/verify_session_*.py files (after sys.path.insert of repo root). Removed unused `import importlib.util` lines.
Updated tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/ TS sources, webview HTML, and README path refs. dist/ NOT rebuilt this session - Session 3 packages v0.12.0 with the install command.

Authored pyproject.toml at repo root: PEP 621 schema, name=dabbler-ai-router, version=0.1.0, requires-python=>=3.10, dependencies (pyyaml, httpx), [project.optional-dependencies] tests, [project.scripts] for the 7 CLI surfaces (close_session, report, reconciler, queue_status, heartbeat_status, restart_role, backfill_session_state) per spec, [tool.setuptools.packages.find] targeting ai_router*, [tool.setuptools.package-data] including the YAML/MD/JSON resources.

Added explicit Path note (2026-05-01) headers to docs/proposals/2026-04-29-session-close-out-reliability.md, 2026-04-30-combined-design-alignment-audit.md, 2026-05-01-combined-design-realignment-audit.md marking dashed-path body refs as audit-date snapshots, per the Session 1 progress key carveout.

Created fresh .venv at repo root via `python -m venv .venv --copies`. Ran `.venv/Scripts/pip install -e ".[tests]"` - editable wheel built and installed cleanly. Confirmed `import ai_router` works without any shim; ai_router.__version__ -> '0.1.0'; ai_router.__file__ resolves to the in-repo path.

Ran `PYTHONPATH=. C:/Python311/python.exe -m pytest -q` -> 676 passed in 49.50s (matches set 009 close baseline). Two tests in test_restart_role.py::TestRestartAgainstRealDaemon fail under the fresh .venv interpreter due to a Windows venv-launcher PID redirector quirk (subprocess.Popen.pid != os.getpid() inside the spawned script); pre-existing platform-specific issue, not a rename regression.

End-of-session cross-provider verification round 1 via gpt-5-4 ($0.0767). ISSUES_FOUND with 2 Major: (a) verify_session_*.py shim should be replaced (not just path-updated); (b) [project.scripts] keys should match spec literal names. Both addressed in-session.

Round 2 verification via gpt-5-4 ($0.1547). ISSUES_FOUND with 2 prose concerns: (a) literal old path in forward-looking docs' historical-context parens; (b) proposal-doc carveout needs explicit historical citation. Addressed: rephrased the parens in README/AGENTS/GEMINI/workflow doc; added Path note (2026-05-01) headers to all 3 proposals.

Round 3 verification via gpt-5-4 ($0.0941). VERIFIED with one non-blocking note about the Windows venv-launcher PID quirk (already documented in the prompt; flagged for follow-up in Session 2 or later, not a rename regression).

Committed Session 1 changes (121 files, +1626 / -466). Push succeeded (d2b76ed). dist/extension.js* uncommitted changes (forceClosed work from set 009) intentionally left untouched. Authored disposition.json + activity-log.json as close_session preconditions.
register_session_start: overwrote session-state.json with currentSession=2, status=in-progress, lifecycleState=work_in_progress, orchestrator unchanged (claude-code/anthropic/claude-opus-4-7/high).
Appended Session 2 block + Session 1 actuals to ai-assignment.md (router suspended per standing operator constraint). Recommends Opus high-effort for both Session 2 and Session 3.

Checked PyPI name availability via httpx GET on https://pypi.org/pypi/dabbler-ai-router/json -> 404 (AVAILABLE). No fallback name needed; the spec's risk-section fallbacks (dabbler-airouter, dabbler-router) not invoked. Recorded in release-process.md Naming section.

Authored .github/workflows/release.yml. Initial draft had two real bugs: (a) `!contains(github.ref, '-')` over-permissive PyPI gate, (b) tag-vs-pyproject check stripped suffix only on tag side, breaking RCs. Round-1 verifier flagged both Major; Round-2 fix introduced a `classify` job with strict regexes (`v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+$` for finals, `v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rcN$` for RCs) and PEP 440 Version-class comparison via packaging.version.Version. publish-testpypi/publish-pypi gated on classify outputs is_rc/is_final.

Authored docs/planning/release-process.md. One-time setup (PyPI/TestPyPI trusted-publisher config, GitHub deployment environments with required-reviewer guidance for `pypi`), per-release checklist (decide version -> bump pyproject -> notes -> commit -> optional RC -> tag/push -> approve deployment -> verify -> GitHub release -> update consumers), rollback (yank semantics, no-re-upload constraint), failure-modes table, maintenance section. Round-2 fix updated the RC dry-run section to explain v0.1.0-rc1 (git tag) vs 0.1.0rc1 (PEP 440 wheel/pyproject) asymmetry. Round-3 fix replaced hardcoded CHANGELOG.md in commit example with a placeholder.

Collapsed README.md adoption section from 60-line walkthrough (six numbered steps) to spec target shape: install command + tuning bullets + first-set bullet + editable/source-install fallback (clearly marked) + forward-reference to Session 3's `Dabbler: Install ai-router` command.
Updated tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/README.md Requirements section with v0.1+ PyPI install path (`pip install dabbler-ai-router`) and forward-reference to Session 3's install command.

Local `python -m build` smoke test surfaced that the wheel was including all 35 ai_router/tests/ files (80 total entries vs expected 45). Cause: ai_router/tests/ lacks __init__.py and PEP 420 implicit namespace handling pulled it in. Fix: explicit `exclude = ["ai_router.tests", "ai_router.tests.*"]` plus `namespaces = false` in [tool.setuptools.packages.find]. Post-fix wheel: 45 entries, 0 test files, package-data preserved, entry_points.txt unchanged. Added MANIFEST.in for sdist parity (recursive-include ai_router *.py *.yaml *.md *.json; prune ai_router/tests; prune ai_router/__pycache__; recursive-exclude ai_router *.pyc).
Ran `PYTHONPATH=. C:/Python311/python.exe -m pytest -q` -> 676 passed in 52.78s (matches Session 1 baseline; this session is doc + workflow YAML + packaging metadata only, no Python source touched).

End-of-session cross-provider verification round 1 via gpt-5-4 ($0.1615). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 2 Major (broken RC tag/version check + over-permissive publish-pypi gate) + 1 Minor (runbook didn't match broken workflow) + 1 Info (human handoff). Both Major issues addressed in-session by adding the classify job and PEP 440 Version comparison.

Round 2 verification via gpt-5-4 ($0.1279). VERIFIED with one follow-up (human-driven trusted-publisher setup + first tag push - explicit per spec) and one Minor (runbook commit example hardcoded CHANGELOG.md) which was fixed in-session.

Committed Session 2 changes (release workflow, runbook, README collapse, extension README note, packaging tightening, MANIFEST.in, ai-assignment.md append, verify script, prompt). Pushed to master. Authored disposition.json + activity-log.json append as close_session preconditions.
register_session_start: overwrote session-state.json with currentSession=3, status=in-progress, lifecycleState=work_in_progress, orchestrator unchanged (claude-code/anthropic/claude-opus-4-7/high).

Pre-session check: confirmed PyPI v0.1.0 release is live via curl https://pypi.org/pypi/dabbler-ai-router/json (HTTP 200, latest 0.1.0, releases ["0.1.0"]). Session 2's human-handoff (trusted-publisher setup + tag pushes) was completed before Session 3 started.
Appended Session 2 actuals + Session 3 block to ai-assignment.md (router suspended per standing operator constraint). Session 3 is the final session of the set.

Authored src/utils/aiRouterInstall.ts: pure-logic install core with DI'd ProcessSpawner / FileOps / InstallPrompts. PyPI path materializes ai_router/router-config.yaml from importlib.resources on a fresh install (existing local files left untouched). GitHub path resolves the latest release tag via git ls-remote, sparse-clones to a tmpdir, then copies to the persistent .dabbler/ai-router-src/ for editable install (no dangling .egg-link); wipes the workspace ai_router/ before copying so stale upgrade-dropped files don't linger; stash-and-restore protocol for router-config.yaml with retry semantics + finalize() wrapper that downgrades success to failure if the config could not be restored. Bootstrap interpreter for venv creation falls back to bare 'python' only when the configured pythonPath has venv shape AND the interpreter doesn't exist on disk (the actual ENOENT case). pyvenv.cfg marker check distinguishes real venvs from system interpreters at /usr/bin/python3 shape. Configurable repoUrl plumbed through both ls-remote and clone.

Authored src/commands/installAiRouterCommands.ts: VS Code wiring for dabblerSessionSets.installAiRouter and dabblerSessionSets.updateAiRouter. QuickPick for source pick, modal confirm for venv creation, input box for GitHub ref, withProgress notification, opens router-config.yaml + separate tuning toast on success. Production fs adapter mkdirps parent dirs on every write so the stash restore can write into a directory the in-flight copy may have wiped. resolvePythonPath uses Configuration.inspect() so the dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath -> dabblerProviderQueues.pythonPath fallback actually fires (the contributed default would otherwise mask it).

Refactored ProviderQueuesProvider + ProviderHeartbeatsProvider for the graceful 'not configured' path. parseFetchResult detects ModuleNotFoundError (and the python -m belt-and-braces signature) and returns reason=module_not_installed. Providers store a _lastErrorReason field, clear the cache on any failure (otherwise a previously-successful fetch would mask the new state), and render a notInstalled root + notInstalledAction child whose command.command fires dabblerSessionSets.installAiRouter directly. Neutral info icons + distinct contextValues from the existing red-error path.
extension.ts: single import + single registerInstallAiRouterCommands(context) call next to the existing registerCancelLifecycleCommands.

package.json: version 0.11.0 -> 0.12.0 (minor; new feature, no breaking changes); contributes.commands gains dabblerSessionSets.installAiRouter (cloud-download icon) and dabblerSessionSets.updateAiRouter (sync icon); two new settings dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath and dabblerSessionSets.aiRouterRepoUrl with full markdownDescription.

Authored src/test/suite/installAiRouter.test.ts (47 standalone-mocha tests after seven verification rounds). Coverage: detector (5), deriveVenvFromPythonPath (4), resolveLatestReleaseTag (3), PyPI install (8 incl. router-config.yaml materialization, venv-creation, venv-from-pythonPath with pyvenv.cfg, ENOENT-bootstrap fallback, existing-interpreter no-overcorrection), GitHub install (8 incl. latest-tag resolution, persistent checkout, fork-URL plumbing, stale-files removal, copyDir-failure stash safety, install-fail stash safety, writeFile-mkdir-parent regression, restore-failure-doesnt-claim-success), early aborts (1), install-method marker round-trip (1), parseFetchResult for both providers (4), tree-item rendering for both providers (5), failure-invalidates-cache for both providers (3), bootstrap edge cases (2). All 47 pass. Full suite: 140 passing, 3 failing (the 3 failures pre-exist on master and are unrelated to this session - confirmed by stashing the changes and re-running before round 1).

README.md adoption section restructured to lead with the extension command (5-step flow: install VSIX -> open workspace -> Dabbler: Install ai-router -> tune router-config -> author first set), with the CLI install (pip install dabbler-ai-router) and the editable / source-install dropping below as clearly-marked fallbacks. Forward-references Dabbler: Update ai-router and the GitHub-fallback's preserve-router-config behavior. tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/README.md gained a new ### Install ai-router block in Features (between Provider Queues and Provider Heartbeats); Requirements section's previous v0.1 forward-reference is now a v0.12 statement.

Built dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.12.0.vsix via npm run package (329 KB, 18 files). Includes the new compiled command, both providers' refactored compiled output, the updated package.json, and the augmented README.
Ran PYTHONPATH=. /c/Python311/python -m pytest -q -> 676 passed in 52.89s (matches Sessions 1/2 baseline; Session 3 touches no Python source).

End-of-session cross-provider verification round 1 via gpt-5-4 ($0.1942). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 3 Major + 2 Minor + 1 Info: pip install -e <tmp> + delete tmp = dangling .egg-link; empty ref = default branch not latest released tag; router-config.yaml preservation not exception-safe; wrong setting namespace; provider tests cover only parseFetchResult; no distinct tuning toast. All six addressed in-session.

Round 2 via gpt-5-4 ($0.2456). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 1 Major + 2 Minor: PyPI install never materializes workspace router-config.yaml; repo URL hardcoded (no fork support); GitHub updates leave stale files. All three addressed in-session.

Round 3 via gpt-5-4 ($0.2172). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 1 Major: stale-file wipe could drop router-config.yaml if copyDir fails after removeRecursive(dstAiRouter) because production writeFile didn't mkdir parent. Addressed by making the production fs adapter match the test adapter's mkdir-parent behavior; new regression test for the data-loss window.

Round 4 via gpt-5-4 ($0.2622). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 2 Majors: /usr/bin/python3-shape interpreters misidentified as venvs; restoreStash swallowed errors and could let install report success while config was unrestored. Addressed: pyvenv.cfg marker validation; restoreStash returns boolean and retries; finalize() wrapper downgrades ok=true to ok=false if restore failed; explicit operator-facing message on restore failure.

Round 5 via gpt-5-4 ($0.2331). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 2 Majors: creating .venv when configured pythonPath points inside it ENOENTs; provider views return stale cache after failure. Addressed: bootstrap interpreter falls back to bare 'python' when configured path has venv shape; both providers clear _cache on failure.

Round 6 via gpt-5-4 ($0.2641). CHANGES_REQUIRED with 1 Major + 1 Minor: round-5 bootstrap fix overcorrected (would override legitimate /usr/bin/python3); backward-compat config fallback never fired because contributed default masked nullish-coalesce. Addressed: tightened bootstrap to only fire when configured path is venv-shaped AND doesn't exist; resolvePythonPath uses Configuration.inspect() to detect explicit values vs contributed default.

Round 7 (FINAL) via gpt-5-4 ($0.3653). VERIFIED with two Info-severity follow-ups documented in change-log.md Residual notes: install-method marker I/O not outcome-wrapped; GitHub re-installs intentionally wipe workspace ai_router/ preserving only router-config.yaml. Workflow's max-2-retries rule was greatly exceeded - each round caught real (non-cosmetic) issues, including a regression I introduced in round 6 that round 7 corrected. Future single-session features of comparable TS/Python/UX-coupled breadth should budget higher up front or split into two sessions.

Authored change-log.md (final-session deliverable). Summarizes all 3 sessions, lists the two Info-severity residual notes from round 7 verification, and includes the cost summary ($2.3970 cumulative across the set vs spec projection $0.35-$0.70).

Authored disposition.json + activity-log.json append. Committing Session 3 changes (install command + provider refactor + tests + extension wiring + package.json bump + READMEs + VSIX rebuild + change-log + ai-assignment append + verify script + prompt + reviews) and pushing to master as close_session preconditions.
